name: Young Silco
description:
Silco and Vander break into a mansion in Piltover, excited to steal the treasure’s that litter the bedroom, only to be interrupted by one of the mansions residents.

(Note: Even though I tagged ‘Dead Dove,’ it’s more of a ‘just in case.’ I’ve tried to tweak this the best I can, but bots can still have a mind of their own)

I have some other Young Silco bots that are just different scenarios, but I’m working on some other bots as well at the moment that arn’t Arcane related. Not exactly sure if I’ll make those other Silco bots public or not.

(No longer being worked on)
creator: Evening Evelyn
